experienceQuestions.question: Created design systems reducing designer-developer cycle times?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Created and published a centralized Figma design system, reducing design handoff cycles by 40% across 5 engineering squads.

experienceQuestions.question: Conducted user research to boost final product metrics?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Organized and analyzed usability test sessions with 35+ users, leading to design iterations that improved signup flow conversion by 28%.

experienceQuestions.question: Redesigned checkout processes increasing target user conversions?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Redesigned digital cart layout interfaces, boosting end-to-end user conversions by 15%.

experienceQuestions.question: Audited design accessibility to secure WCAG alignment?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Audited visual assets and color contrasts to hit WCAG 2.1 AAA benchmarks, improving product inclusivity margins.

experienceQuestions.question: Aligned brand guidelines to increase customer trusts?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Standardized vector logos and core typography grids, raising brand recognition score values by 22%.

experienceQuestions.question: Designed interactive high-fidelity prototypes to secure stakeholders?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed fully interactive, animated high-fidelity prototypes in Figma and Framer, accelerating stakeholder buy-in by 50%.

projectQuestions.question: Structured modular Figma auto-layout component files?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Created responsive Figma UI components utilizing auto-layout v4 models and custom variant configurations.

projectQuestions.question: Drafted user journey flow maps in FigJam or Miro?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Mapped out 15 end-to-end user journey flows, outlining optimal checkout and navigation decision branches.

projectQuestions.question: Constructed low-fidelity wireframe structures?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Constructed pixel-perfect low-fidelity wireframe models, validating layout structures prior to final branding styling.

projectQuestions.question: Designed customized SVG vector icons or design assets?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Engineered a custom pixel-aligned vector icon package, ensuring scalable SVG loads across web assets.

projectQuestions.question: Designed UI animations or interactive states in Framer?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Engineered interface transitions and hover feedback parameters, raising interactive checkout metrics by 15%.

projectQuestions.question: Linked complex transition pathways for interactive validation?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Linked complex transition pathways across 45 screens to construct comprehensive user test paths.
